key_insights.insight: The comparison with others is often the root of unhappiness, especially when basic needs are unmet.
key_insights.quote: when sometime i'm like you people that are being very comfortablenever been in the struggle i'm like oh money doesn't make happiness money blah blah blah i'm like give me the money and then keep the happiness because i have been without money and i know whatit feels like all day long i prefer being money.

key_insights.insight: Adversity can be a powerful motivator, sparking a desire to change one's circumstances and prove others wrong.
key_insights.quote: I promised myself that I'm going to change that. I'm going to prove them it's not my fault. I was just a child, just as them. Who doesn't have the same opportunity as them?

key_insights.insight: Having a clear vision can blind you to obstacles, but having that vision is why you don't give up.
key_insights.quote: your dream was so big that he uh blinds you youcouldn't see any anything else except what you have not what is in front you cannot see anything in front of youexcept what you have in your mind you could only see what is in your mind and regardless what isin front of you what uh the obstacle is in front of you you can only see what in the front ofin your mind and it couldn't nothing could stop you

key_insights.insight: Freedom often requires sacrifice, even if it means turning down lucrative opportunities that come with unacceptable constraints.
key_insights.quote: So I basically left a lot of money on the table in order to get my freedom. I bought my freedom, basically.

key_insights.insight: One should give their all, so that even when not succeding, they still can find peace in themselves.
key_insights.quote: It might work, might not, but at least you will be in peace with yourselfknowing that you have given it all.

key_insights.insight: Taking action, even when facing overwhelming emotions, is essential to prevent being trapped by negative thoughts and memories.
key_insights.quote: At that momentthat you feel like you don't wantto do anything is exactly the momentthat you have to do somethingto get out of there.

actionable_advice.advice: Act even when you don't feel like it.
actionable_advice.how_to: When feeling overwhelmed, find something, anything to do, and do it.

memorable_stories: The journey from Cameroon to Europe involved crossing the Sahara Desert, drinking contaminated water, attempting to climb barbed-wire fences, and crossing the sea in a tiny inflatable boat.
Francis living in a parking lot for two months when first arriving in Paris.
Francis talking about how his mother stood by him and supported even when he was losing it.
Details on how the Anthony Joshua fight was rigged against Francis.
contrarian_claims: Even as the heavyweight champion of the UFC, Francis said he was broke.
The failure is in not taking action and even trying, rather than the fact that you don't succeed.
That having lost his son, felt like his fighting career has failed. That everything that was his reason for fighting, fell apart.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Francis Ngannou Breaks Down Sharing Heartbreaking Story: "I Don't Know The Purpose Of Fighting Anymore", "I Feel Powerless", "I Don't Know How To Deal With This!"
